headline: Assessing CSX (CSX) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why CSX stock is on investors’ radar CSX (CSX) has drawn fresh attention after recent price moves, with the stock up about 4% over the past month and about 18% over the past 3 months. That shift, alongside CSX’s roughly US$87.9b market value and rail focused freight network, has investors revisiting how its current share price lines up with business performance and value characteristics. See our latest analysis for CSX. CSX’s recent share price moves include an 18.3% 90 day share price return...
